content.content: I bought an Adidas T-shirt last month. Could you find the invoice and save it to /user?

Once I retrieve the order history, I can extract the order ID for the product and subsequently get the invoice. After obtaining the invoice, I would then save it to the specified directory. 
</function_thought>
